title: 10 Years of Meta’s Commitment to Python
description:
This year marks Meta’s 10th consecutive year as a sponsor of the Python Software Foundation (PSF), the charitable organization dedicated to advancing, supporting, and protecting the open-source Python programming language and the community that sustains it. Python is one of the world’s most influential programming languages, and we use it across our engineering stack, from [...]

title: Kodee’s Kotlin Roundup: Kotlin Turns 15, Kotlin 2.4.0, and the Kotlin Toolchain
description: Hi everyone! May and June brought so much Kotlin news that I needed a little extra space for this roundup. Kotlin turned 15, Kotlin 2.4.0 arrived with new capabilities for developers on every platform, and I found plenty of ways to learn, experiment, build AI agents and AI-powered applications, and explore useful Kotlin Multiplatform libraries. title: GitHub Copilot now an Integrated Agent in JetBrains IDEs
description: Born out of a deep partnership between JetBrains and GitHub, this integration makes Copilot native in the agent picker and delivers a more stable agent experience directly in the IDE you already use every day. From ACP Registry to native experience Copilot was previously accessible via the ACP Registry, but this integration takes things further. […]

title: TeamCity 2026.1.2 and 2025.11.6 Are Now Available
description: Today we’re releasing two bug-fix updates for TeamCity On-Premises 2025.11 and 2026.1 servers. The 2026.1.2 update addresses a little over 10 issues, including the following: Version 2025.11.6 focuses exclusively on resolving security issues and does not include general bug fixes. To keep your server secure, we strongly recommend installing this update. See TeamCity 2026.1.2 Release […]
creator: Dmitrii Korovin

title: Kotlin Notebook Sunset
description: Starting from IntelliJ IDEA 2026.2, JetBrains will sunset Kotlin Notebook as a product and will no longer maintain it. The plugin will remain available on an open-source model so the community can continue its development.  Below, we explain why we’re making this change, how it affects current Kotlin Notebook users, what comes next, and how […]
creator: Marco Behler

title: Kotlin Comes to BlueJ
description: Kotlin support is now available in BlueJ, one of the most established environments for teaching introductory object-oriented programming (OOP). This work is the result of a collaboration between JetBrains and the BlueJ team at King’s College London, including Professor Michael Kölling and Dr. Neil Brown, whose work has shaped programming education for decades. Download BlueJ […]
creator: Ksenia Shneyveys

title: 엘라스틱 with LLM
description:
엘라스틱의 LLM 연동 설정.





맥락이 유지되는 질답 작업을 하려면 chat_completion 옵션이 필요하다는데, 제미나이(Google AI Studio) 설정 화면에서는 보이지 않는다. 




Ollama를 써보고 싶은데, 얘는 아예 서비스 리스트에 포함되어 있지도 않음. 어쩌지? 제미나이한테 물어봤다. Ollama를 OpenAI로 속이면 된다고(..)





Ollama는 로컬 서비스라 API 키는 필요 없다. 아무 값이나 입력 후, chat_completion 옵션 선택.



등록 완료.





스플렁크에 비해 토큰을 많이 쓰는 느낌?


관련 글

Splunk with LLM
creator: Unknown

title: The Role of Static Code Analysis in Fintech Compliance
description: What’s at stake with every commit Security incidents in financial services are both frequent and costly. The average data breach in the financial industry cost USD 6.08 million in 2024. title: 나의 4개의 축 이야기 - AI 시대 학습할 것들
description: 나만의 4개의 축을 선정하게 된 것은 노정석님의 유튜브에서 한 어떤 이야기 때문이었다. 노정석님은 매일 1시간씩 AI 를 통해 학습하는 방식으로 기존 3년 정도 걸렸던 박사과정을 1년으로 줄여서 학습한다는 것을 이야기 한 적이 있다. 이 때 매우 공감된 것이 강의를 듣고 책을 읽고 논문을 읽고 하는 노력이 많이 드는 과정을 AI 를 통해 손 쉽게 얻을 수

description:
If you’re building and maintaining Visual Studio extensions, you’ve probably ended up with some sort of build and publishing workflow – whether it’s manual, scripted, or stitched together over time.
